title: Extra Minerals & Stuff
description: Adds some tools and minerals that you can use in your survival world
body:
# This mod in in development and is not finished yet. We are adding a new tool / item / armor / block / feature on every Alpha Update.
Extra Minerals & Stuff adds some minerals on your world, and with that minerals you can make tools/armor.

You can create:
- Green Tools (better than netherite, can be obtained without netherite, but netherite tools will be needed to make the tools in a future update)
